claim_boundary: Public research only. Marketplace and distributor listings are sourcing signals, not AVL evidence, not signed supplier drawings, not production quotes, and not release approval.

records.candidate: Cirrus Logic/Wolfson WM8962 QFN class or Cirrus CS47L35 smart codec class
records.license_access_constraints: Datasheets are public; exact CAD/STEP and land pattern require selected MPN and license review.
records.blocked_reason: No exact QFN48 codec MPN selected; current footprint is only a generic audio signal contract.

records.candidate: TI LM3697 or SG Micro SGM37603 class white LED backlight driver
records.license_access_constraints: Public datasheets; STEP model must be downloaded from manufacturer/distributor CAD portal and checked for reuse terms.
records.blocked_reason: LM3697 is DSBGA12 and does not match the repo QFN24 placeholder; exact QFN24 driver is not selected.

records.candidate: Custom 1S Li-polymer pack with PCM, NTC, and 4-pin connector
records.license_access_constraints: Signed pack drawing, safety documents, and sample inspection are external supplier artifacts.
records.blocked_reason: Pin order, connector, cell/PCM dimensions, safety docs, and STEP are supplier-specific.

records.candidate: SincereFirst SF-XR3855A-A0 OV13855 13MP AF MIPI camera module
records.license_access_constraints: Public listings are not signed drawings; exact FPC pinout and STEP require RFQ/supplier release pack.
records.blocked_reason: Exact 24-pin FPC pin order, connector, optical datum, and STEP are missing.

records.candidate: SincereFirst GC5035 5MP MIPI camera module family
records.license_access_constraints: Exact module drawing and STEP are external supplier artifacts.
records.blocked_reason: Exact SF-G5035S60FY public evidence, 30-pin FPC pin order, connector, and STEP are missing.

records.candidate: Chenghao CH550FH01A / CH550FH01A-CT 5.5 inch 1080x1920 MIPI touch display
records.license_access_constraints: Exact signed outline/FPC drawing, pinout, display init, touch data, and STEP require supplier pack.
records.blocked_reason: Public sources conflict on pin count; exact 40-pin 0.30 mm FPC order is not proven.

records.candidate: Analog Devices MAX17055 or TI BQ27426 class single-cell fuel gauge
records.license_access_constraints: Public datasheets; exact STEP/EDA model must be checked through official/distributor CAD portals.
records.blocked_reason: Current WLCSP12 placeholder is not tied to an exact selected MPN; BQ27426 is 9-ball DSBGA.

records.license_access_constraints: Datasheet is public; CAD/STEP model download terms must be checked before committing vendor model.
records.blocked_reason: Good candidate, but exact MPN/CAD intake and footprint replacement are not committed.

records.candidate: ST ST25R3916 or ST25R3916B QFN32 NFC controller
records.license_access_constraints: ST CAD resources require download/license review; antenna tuning remains design-specific.
records.blocked_reason: Exact variant, antenna/matching design, and CAD intake are not frozen.

records.candidate: Tuned NFC antenna matching network using 0201/0402 passives
records.license_access_constraints: Release values require antenna supplier drawing and VNA/tuning report.
records.blocked_reason: No fixed off-the-shelf loop-match footprint can be released without antenna tuning.

records.license_access_constraints: Official hardware design/reference layout/STEP may require Quectel portal, NDA, or direct supplier request; third-party CAD requires independent verification.
records.blocked_reason: Exact regional SKU pack, official land pattern, official STEP, RF layout notes, and certification scope are missing.

records.candidate: Bosch BMI270 or ST LSM6DSO32 IMU class; current QFN24 placeholder does not match these LGA14 candidates
records.license_access_constraints: Public datasheets and CAD resources; exact selected part model license must be reviewed.
records.blocked_reason: No selected QFN24 sensor hub has been identified; public IMU candidates use LGA14 packages.

records.candidate: TI TXS4555, NXP/Nexperia NVT4555/NXT4556 class SIM interface level translator and supply/protection ICs
records.license_access_constraints: Public datasheets exist; exact selected package and CAD/STEP model license must be checked before intake.
records.blocked_reason: No exact USIM level-shift/ESD MPN and package has been selected to match the current 10-pad placeholder.

selected_hardware_supplement.assessment: Strong off-the-shelf module candidate; still needs antenna, firmware, regulatory, and CAD intake closure.
Good release candidate after official footprint/3D model license and drawing dimensions are verified.
Strong connector family with official drawings and 3D models; exact circuit count and mate pair still required.

selected_hardware_supplement.candidate: Panasonic EVQ-P7/P3/9P7 side push tactile switch family
selected_hardware_supplement.assessment: Credible off-the-shelf family; exact terminal and force variant must be selected before mechanical freeze.
Public charger candidates exist, but final phone power architecture and package selection are not frozen.
Capable but potentially over-sized/over-cost for USB2 charging-only phone; firmware/policy flow required.
